name: French A1 Vocabulary
description: Beginner French — CEFR A1 level vocabulary

facts.explanation: accepter — to accept.
accompagner — to accompany, to escort.
accueil — reception, hospitality. Also: acceptance, home page (of a website)
accueillir — to welcome, to accommodate. Also: to host
acheter — to purchase; buy.
activité — activity (something to do for educational, recreational, or other purposes). Also: activity, hustle and bustle, occupation, profession, job, work
admirer — to admire.
adorer — to love, to adore. Also: to worship
